title: Parent — Assignments
content:
Overview


The Assignments page allows parents to view all assignments that teachers have sent to their children. Parents can filter by child, term, year, and subject to find specific assignments.



Selecting a Child


Child sub-tabs appear at the top of the page — one for each linked child. Click a child's tab to view their assignments. Each child's assignments are completely separate.



Filters


Three filters help narrow down what's displayed:


  • Term: Fall Semester, Spring Semester, Winter Semester, September Term, January Term, or May Term
  • Year: Plus/minus buttons to change the academic year
  • Subject: Dropdown to filter by a specific subject or view all subjects

An assignment count shows how many match the current filters.



Assignment Details


Each assignment displays:


  • Title: The assignment name (e.g., "Unit 3 Practice" or "Chapter 5 Review")
  • Subject: Which subject the assignment is for
  • Teacher: The teacher who sent it
  • Description: Full instructions from the teacher detailing what the student should do
  • Date sent: When the assignment was issued

Assignments are read-only for parents. They show what the child should be working on but cannot be submitted through the portal.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Use the sub-tabs at the top to switch between your children."
  • "Filter by subject to focus on one class at a time."
  • "The description tells you exactly what your child should be working on."
  • "If you don't see assignments, check that you've selected the right term and year."
  • "Assignments are read-only — parents can view but not submit work."
